Wave propagation algorithm on double-curved NURBS with G1/G2 blend surface
construction between organic and rigid zones. Automated curvature validation and
manufacturing constraint checks (overhang limits, wall thickness for FDM).
Applicable to medical/dental device surface modeling, ergo
nomic product housings, organic form blending for consumer
